# Generated Agent exported API baseline. Review every diff; do not edit by hand.
# Packages: every non-internal, non-example package in the agent module.
# Regenerate: go test ./internal/arch -run TestExportedAPIMatchesBaseline -update-api

.: const ( DefaultBindingName = core.DefaultBindingName Unknown = core.Unknown True = core.True False = core.False StatusNotStarted = core.StatusNotStarted StatusRunning = core.StatusRunning StatusCompleted = core.StatusCompleted StatusFailed = core.StatusFailed StatusStuck = core.StatusStuck StatusWaiting = core.StatusWaiting StatusPaused = core.StatusPaused StatusTerminated = core.StatusTerminated StatusKilled = core.StatusKilled RetrySafetyUnspecified = core.RetrySafetyUnspecified RetrySafetyIdempotent = core.RetrySafetyIdempotent RetrySafetyCompensated = core.RetrySafetyCompensated )
.: const ( SuspensionSchemaVersion = interaction.SuspensionSchemaVersion SuspensionHuman = interaction.SuspensionHuman SuspensionTool = interaction.SuspensionTool InteractionEventModelRequest = interaction.EventModelRequest InteractionEventModelResponse = interaction.EventModelResponse InteractionEventToolCall = interaction.EventToolCall InteractionEventToolResult = interaction.EventToolResult InteractionEventPause = interaction.EventPause InteractionEventResume = interaction.EventResume InteractionStopNone = interaction.StopNone InteractionStopBudget = interaction.StopBudget InteractionStopSteps = interaction.StopSteps )
.: func DefaultRetryPolicy() RetryPolicy
.: func MustNewEngine(config EngineConfig) *Engine
.: func New(config AgentConfig) *Agent
.: func NewAction[In, Out any](name string, fn func(context.Context, *ProcessContext, In) (Out, error), config ActionConfig) *FuncAction[In, Out]
.: func NewCondition(name string, fn func(context.Context, *ConditionEnv) Truth) *FuncCondition
.: func NewEngine(config EngineConfig) (*Engine, error)
.: func NewGoal(config GoalConfig) *Goal
.: func NewOutputGoal[T any](config GoalConfig) *Goal
.: func NewSession(id, userID, agentName string) Session
.: func PromptJSON[T any](ctx context.Context, process *ProcessContext, text string, config PromptConfig) (T, error)
.: func Result[T any](process ProcessView) (T, bool)
.: type Action = core.Action
.: type ActionConfig = core.ActionConfig
.: type Agent = core.Agent
.: type AgentConfig = core.AgentConfig
.: type ChatCapability = core.ChatCapability
.: type Condition = core.Condition
.: type ConditionEnv = core.ConditionEnv
.: type Deployment = runtime.Deployment
.: type DeploymentRef = core.DeploymentRef
.: type Engine = runtime.Engine
.: type EngineConfig = runtime.Config
.: type Extension = core.Extension
.: type FuncAction[In, Out any] = core.FuncAction[In, Out]
.: type FuncCondition = core.FuncCondition
.: type Goal = core.Goal
.: type GoalConfig = core.GoalConfig
.: type InteractionEvent = interaction.Event
.: type InteractionEventKind = interaction.EventKind
.: type InteractionLimits = interaction.Limits
.: type InteractionStopReason = interaction.StopReason
.: type Process = runtime.Process
.: type ProcessContext = core.ProcessContext
.: type ProcessOptions = core.ProcessOptions
.: type ProcessStatus = core.ProcessStatus
.: type ProcessView = core.ProcessView
.: type PromptConfig = core.PromptConfig
.: type RetryPolicy = core.RetryPolicy
.: type RetrySafety = core.RetrySafety
.: type Session = core.Session
.: type StuckPolicy = core.StuckPolicy
.: type Suspension = interaction.Suspension
.: type SuspensionKind = interaction.SuspensionKind
.: type Truth = core.Truth
core: const ( ActionSucceeded ActionStatus = iota ActionFailed ActionWaiting ActionPaused )
core: const ( DefaultBindingName = "it" LastResultBindingName = "last_result" )
core: const ( RetrySafetyUnspecified RetrySafety = iota RetrySafetyIdempotent RetrySafetyCompensated )
core: const ( StatusNotStarted ProcessStatus = iota StatusRunning StatusCompleted StatusFailed StatusStuck StatusWaiting StatusPaused StatusTerminated StatusKilled )
core: const ( StuckStop StuckDecision = iota StuckReplan )
core: const ( TerminationScopeAgent TerminationScope = iota TerminationScopeAction )
core: const ( ToolGroupHostAccess ToolGroupPermission = iota ToolGroupInternetAccess )
core: const ( Unknown Truth = 0 True Truth = 1 False Truth = 2 )
core: const ActionRunConditionPrefix = "action_ran_"
core: const ProcessSnapshotSchemaVersion uint16 = 1

core: func Or(left, right Condition) Condition

core: func PromptJSON[T any](ctx context.Context, process *ProcessContext, text string, config PromptConfig) (T, error)

core: func RequireToolGroup(role string, allowed ...ToolGroupPermission) ToolGroupRequirement
core: func Result[T any](process ProcessView) (T, bool)
core: func TruthOf(value bool) Truth
core: func TypeKey(value any) string
core: func TypeNameOf(typ reflect.Type) string
core: func TypeName[T any]() string
core: func WithProcessView(ctx context.Context, process ProcessView) context.Context
core: type Action interface { Metadata() ActionMetadata Execute(ctx context.Context, process *ProcessContext) (ActionStatus, error) }
core: type ActionConfig struct { Description string Preconditions []string Effects []string Repeatable bool Retry RetryPolicy Cost ScoreFunc Value ScoreFunc ToolGroups []ToolGroupRequirement Inputs []Binding Outputs []Binding ClearWorkingState bool }
core: type ActionFunc[In, Out any] func(ctx context.Context, process *ProcessContext, input In) (Out, error)
core: type ActionMetadata struct { Name string Description string Inputs []Binding Outputs []Binding Preconditions ConditionSet Effects ConditionSet Repeatable bool Retry RetryPolicy ToolGroups []ToolGroupRequirement Cost ScoreFunc Value ScoreFunc ClearWorkingState bool }
core: type ActionMiddleware interface { Extension RunAction( ctx context.Context, process ProcessView, action Action, next func() (ActionStatus, error), ) (ActionStatus, error) }
core: type ActionRunSnapshot struct { ActionName string `json:"action"` StartedAt time.Time `json:"started_at"` Duration time.Duration `json:"duration_ns"` Status string `json:"status"` Attempts int `json:"attempts"` }
core: type ActionStatus int8
core: type Agent struct { }
core: type AgentConfig struct { Name string Description string Version string StuckPolicy StuckPolicy Actions []Action Goals []*Goal Conditions []Condition PlannerName string }
core: type AgentValidator interface { Extension Validate(agent *Agent) error }
core: type Binding struct { Name string Type string }
core: type Blackboard interface { Extension BlackboardReader BlackboardWriter Clone() Blackboard ClearWorkingState() }
core: type BlackboardReader interface { ID() string Load(key string) (any, bool) Lookup(variable, typeName string) (any, bool) HasValue(variable, typeName string) bool Objects() []any Condition(key string) (bool, bool) Inspect(verbose bool) string }
core: type BlackboardWriter interface { Store(key string, value any) StoreTransient(key string, value any) Add(value any) AddTransient(value any) Bind(value any) BindTransient(value any) StoreAll(m map[string]any) StoreProtected(key string, value any) Hide(target any) StoreCondition(key string, value bool) }
core: type Budget struct { CostLimit float64 ActionLimit int TokenLimit int }
core: type BudgetPolicy struct { Budget Budget }
core: type ChatCapability struct { Model chat.Model Streamer chat.Streamer }
core: type ChatGuardrails struct { CallMiddlewares []chat.CallMiddleware StreamMiddlewares []chat.StreamMiddleware MaxToolRounds int }
core: type ChatProvider interface { Extension Chat(process ProcessView) ChatCapability }
core: type Condition interface { Name() string Cost() float64 Evaluate(ctx context.Context, env *ConditionEnv) Truth }
core: type ConditionEnv struct { Process ProcessView Blackboard BlackboardReader RunInteraction func(context.Context, Interaction) (interaction.Result, error) }
core: type ConditionFunc func(ctx context.Context, env *ConditionEnv) Truth
core: type ConditionSet map[string]Truth
core: type Dependencies struct { }
core: type DependencyKey[T any] struct { }
core: type DeploymentRef struct { Name string `json:"name"` Version string `json:"version,omitempty"` Digest string `json:"digest"` }
core: type EmbeddingCall struct { Timestamp time.Time `json:"timestamp"` Model string `json:"model"` Provider string `json:"provider,omitempty"` CostUSD float64 `json:"cost_usd"` InputTokens int64 `json:"input_tokens"` InputCount int `json:"input_count"` Duration time.Duration `json:"duration_ns"` ActionName string `json:"action,omitempty"` }
core: type Extension interface { Name() string }
core: type FuncAction[In, Out any] struct { }
core: type FuncCondition struct { }
core: type Goal struct { }
core: type GoalApprover interface { Extension Approve(process ProcessView, goal *Goal) bool }
core: type GoalConfig struct { Name string Description string Preconditions []string Inputs []Binding Value ScoreFunc Tags []string Examples []string Tool *GoalTool }
core: type GoalTool struct { Standalone bool Description string }
core: type GoalToolConfig struct { Standalone bool Description string }
core: type IDGenerator interface { Extension Next() string }
core: type Interaction struct { ID string Model chat.Model Request *chat.Request Tools interaction.ToolResolver Limits interaction.Limits Observe interaction.Observer Attribute ModelAttributionFunc }
core: type LazyToolGroup struct { }
core: type LazyToolGroupResolver struct { }
core: type MemoryProcessStore struct { }
core: type MemorySessionStore struct { }
core: type ModelAttribution struct { Provider string CostUSD float64 }
core: type ModelAttributionFunc func(response *chat.Response) ModelAttribution
core: type ModelCall struct { Timestamp time.Time `json:"timestamp"` Model string `json:"model"` Provider string `json:"provider,omitempty"` CostUSD float64 `json:"cost_usd"` PromptTokens int64 `json:"prompt_tokens"` CompletionTokens int64 `json:"completion_tokens"` ReasoningTokens int64 `json:"reasoning_tokens,omitempty"` CacheReadInputTokens int64 `json:"cache_read_input_tokens,omitempty"` CacheWriteInputTokens int64 `json:"cache_write_input_tokens,omitempty"` Duration time.Duration `json:"duration_ns"` ActionName string `json:"action,omitempty"` }
core: type ParseTruthFunc func(string) Truth
core: type ProcessContext struct { }
core: type ProcessContextConfig struct { Process ProcessView Control ProcessControl Usage UsageRecorder Blackboard Blackboard Session *Session Dependencies *Dependencies Chat func() (ChatCapability, error) MaxToolRounds int Emit func(context.Context, any) ResolveTools func(context.Context, []ToolGroupRequirement) ([]tools.Tool, error) RunInteraction func(context.Context, Interaction) (interaction.Result, error) ToolCallCancel func(context.CancelFunc) (release func()) ActionToolGroups []ToolGroupRequirement }
core: type ProcessControl interface { TerminateAgent(reason string) TerminateAction(reason string) TerminateToolCall() Suspend(ctx context.Context, suspension interaction.Suspension) (ActionStatus, error) }
core: type ProcessOptions struct { Blackboard Blackboard Budget Budget Dependencies *Dependencies Session *Session Extensions []Extension Guardrails *ChatGuardrails }
core: type ProcessSnapshot struct { SchemaVersion uint16 `json:"schema_version"` Revision uint64 `json:"revision"` ID string `json:"id"` ParentID string `json:"parent_id,omitempty"` Depth int `json:"depth,omitempty"` Deployment DeploymentRef `json:"deployment"` StartedAt time.Time `json:"started_at"` CapturedAt time.Time `json:"captured_at"` Status ProcessStatus `json:"-"` Suspension *interaction.Suspension `json:"suspension,omitempty"` GoalName string `json:"goal_name,omitempty"` History []ActionRunSnapshot `json:"history,omitempty"` Failure string `json:"failure,omitempty"` Cost float64 `json:"cost"` Tokens int `json:"tokens"` ModelCalls []ModelCall `json:"model_calls,omitempty"` EmbeddingCalls []EmbeddingCall `json:"embedding_calls,omitempty"` Blackboard map[string]TaggedValue `json:"blackboard,omitempty"` Conditions map[string]bool `json:"conditions,omitempty"` Objects []TaggedValue `json:"objects,omitempty"` }
core: type ProcessStatus int8
core: type ProcessStore interface { SnapshotReader SnapshotWriter }
core: type ProcessView interface { ID() string ParentID() string Deployment() DeploymentRef StartedAt() time.Time Status() ProcessStatus Goal() *Goal Blackboard() BlackboardReader Failure() error Suspension() *interaction.Suspension WorldState() WorldState Usage() (cost float64, tokens int, actions int) ModelCalls() []ModelCall EmbeddingCalls() []EmbeddingCall }
core: type PromptCondition struct { }
core: type PromptConditionConfig struct { Name string Model chat.Model Prompt PromptFunc Parse ParseTruthFunc Cost float64 }
core: type PromptConfig struct { System string Options *chat.Options Tools []tools.Tool DisableActionTools bool MaxToolRounds int }
core: type PromptFunc func(context.Context, *ConditionEnv) string
core: type ReplanRequest struct { Reason string Update func(Blackboard) }
core: type RetryPolicy struct { MaxAttempts int BaseDelay time.Duration MaxDelay time.Duration Safety RetrySafety }
core: type RetrySafety uint8
core: type RevisionConflictError struct { ProcessID string Expected uint64 Actual uint64 }
core: type ScoreFunc func(WorldState) float64
core: type Session struct { ID string `json:"id"` ParentID string `json:"parent_id,omitempty"` UserID string `json:"user_id,omitempty"` AgentName string `json:"agent_name"` StartedAt time.Time `json:"started_at"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` Metadata map[string]any `json:"metadata,omitempty"` }
core: type SessionInfo struct { ID string ParentID string UserID string AgentName string StartedAt time.Time UpdatedAt time.Time }
core: type SessionStore interface { Save(ctx context.Context, session Session) error Load(ctx context.Context, id string) (Session, error) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error List(ctx context.Context) ([]string, error) }
core: type SnapshotDeleter interface { Delete(context.Context, string) error }
core: type SnapshotLister interface { List(context.Context) ([]string, error) }
core: type SnapshotReader interface { Load(context.Context, string) (ProcessSnapshot, error) }
core: type SnapshotWriter interface { Save(context.Context, ProcessSnapshot, uint64) (uint64, error) }
core: type StaticToolGroupResolver struct { }
core: type StopPolicy interface { Extension Check(process ProcessView) (stop bool, reason string) }
core: type StuckDecision uint8
core: type StuckPolicy interface { Recover(ctx context.Context, process ProcessView, blackboard BlackboardWriter) StuckResult }
core: type StuckResult struct { Decision StuckDecision Reason string }
core: type TaggedValue struct { Type string `json:"t"` Value json.RawMessage `json:"v"` }
core: type TerminationScope int
core: type TerminationSignal struct { Scope TerminationScope Reason string }
core: type ToolGroup interface { Info() ToolGroupInfo Tools(ctx context.Context) ([]tools.Tool, error) }
core: type ToolGroupInfo struct { Role string Ref ToolGroupRef Permissions []ToolGroupPermission }
core: type ToolGroupPermission int
core: type ToolGroupRef struct { Provider string Name string Version *semver.Version }
core: type ToolGroupRequirement struct { Role string AllowedPermissions []ToolGroupPermission }
core: type ToolGroupResolver interface { Extension Resolve(ctx context.Context, requirement ToolGroupRequirement) (ToolGroup, bool, error) }
core: type ToolMiddleware interface { Extension WrapTool( process ProcessView, action Action, tool tools.Tool, ) tools.Tool }
core: type Truth int8
core: type UUIDGenerator struct{}
core: type UsageRecorder interface { RecordUsage(ctx context.Context, cost float64, tokens int) RecordModelCall(ctx context.Context, call ModelCall) RecordEmbeddingCall(ctx context.Context, call EmbeddingCall) }
core: type WorldState interface { Conditions() ConditionSet Timestamp() time.Time Key() string Apply(effects ConditionSet) WorldState }
core: var ( ErrInvalidDependencyKey = errors.New("agent: invalid dependency key") ErrDependencyNotFound = errors.New("agent: dependency not found") ErrDependencyTypeMismatch = errors.New("agent: dependency type mismatch") ErrDependencyExists = errors.New("agent: dependency already registered") ErrDependenciesFrozen = errors.New("agent: dependencies are frozen") ErrNilDependency = errors.New("agent: nil dependency") )
core: var ( ErrSnapshotNotFound = errors.New("process store: snapshot not found") ErrSnapshotSchema = errors.New("process snapshot: unsupported schema") ErrInvalidSnapshot = errors.New("process snapshot: invalid") ErrRevisionConflict = errors.New("process store: revision conflict") )
core: var ErrParallelBranchControl = errors.New("agent: parallel workflow branch cannot control process lifecycle")
core: var ErrSessionNotFound = errSessionNotFound{}

event: func NewHeader(processID string) Header

event: func NewNamedListener(name string, fn func(context.Context, Event)) *NamedListener
event: type ActionFinished struct { Header Action core.Action `json:"-"` Status core.ActionStatus `json:"-"` Duration time.Duration `json:"-"` Err error `json:"-"` }
event: type ActionStarted struct { Header Action core.Action `json:"-"` StartedAt time.Time `json:"-"` }
event: type AgentDeployed struct { Header Deployment core.DeploymentRef `json:"deployment"` }
event: type AgentUndeployed struct { Header Deployment core.DeploymentRef `json:"deployment"` }
event: type EmbeddingCallRecorded struct { Header Call core.EmbeddingCall `json:"-"` }
event: type Event interface { Timestamp() time.Time ProcessID() string Kind() string }
event: type GoalAchieved struct { Header Goal *core.Goal `json:"-"` }
event: type Header struct { }
event: type InteractionBoundary struct { Header Deployment core.DeploymentRef `json:"deployment"` InteractionID string `json:"interaction_id"` Boundary interaction.Event `json:"boundary"` }
event: type Listener interface { OnEvent(ctx context.Context, event Event) }
event: type ListenerFunc func(context.Context, Event)
event: type ModelCallRecorded struct { Header Call core.ModelCall `json:"-"` }
event: type Multicast struct { }
event: type NamedListener struct { }
event: type PlanCreated struct { Header Plan *planning.Plan `json:"-"` }
event: type PlanningStarted struct { Header State core.WorldState `json:"-"` }
event: type ProcessCompleted struct { Header Goal *core.Goal `json:"-"` Result any `json:"-"` }

event: type ProcessFailed struct { Header Err error `json:"-"` }
event: type ProcessKilled struct { Header Reason string `json:"reason,omitempty"` }
event: type ProcessSnapshotFailed struct { Header Policy string `json:"policy"` Err error `json:"-"` }

toolloop: type Checkpoint struct { SchemaVersion uint16 `json:"schema_version"` ID string `json:"id"` Round int `json:"round"` MaxRounds int `json:"max_rounds"` ToolsetDigest string `json:"toolset_digest"` Request *chat.Request `json:"request"` Response *chat.Response `json:"response"` Results []chat.ToolResult `json:"results,omitempty"` NextCall int `json:"next_call"` }
toolloop: type Config struct { MaxRounds int }
toolloop: type Event struct { Kind EventKind `json:"kind"` Round int `json:"round"` Final bool `json:"final,omitempty"` Request *chat.Request `json:"request,omitempty"` Response *chat.Response `json:"response,omitempty"` ToolCall *chat.ToolCall `json:"tool_call,omitempty"` ToolResult *chat.ToolResult `json:"tool_result,omitempty"` Pause *Pause `json:"pause,omitempty"` Resume *Resume `json:"resume,omitempty"` }
toolloop: type EventKind string

toolloop: type PauseError struct { ID string Reason string Prompt json.RawMessage ResumeSchema json.RawMessage }
toolloop: type Resume struct { ID string `json:"id"` Input json.RawMessage `json:"input"` }

toolloop: var ( ErrInvalidCheckpoint = errors.New("toolloop: invalid checkpoint") ErrAmbiguousToolCalls = errors.New("toolloop: ambiguous tool calls") )

toolloop: var ErrInvalidControlFlow = errors.New("toolloop: invalid control flow")

toolpolicy: var ErrToolAlreadyCalled = errors.New("toolpolicy: tool has already been called once in this scope")
toolpolicy: var ErrToolLocked = errors.New("toolpolicy: tool is locked by an unlock condition")

workflow: func (h *AttemptHistory[Out]) Best() (Attempt[Out], bool)
workflow: func (h *AttemptHistory[Out]) Count() int
workflow: func (h *AttemptHistory[Out]) Last() (Attempt[Out], bool)
workflow: func (h *History[T]) Count() int
workflow: func (h *History[T]) Last() (T, bool)
workflow: func Consensus[In, Element any](config ConsensusConfig[In, Element]) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: func DefaultKey[Element ~string](element Element) string
workflow: func Loop[In, Out any]( engine *runtime.Engine, config LoopConfig[In, Out], ) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: func Parallel[In, Element, Result any]( engine *runtime.Engine, config ParallelConfig[In, Element, Result], ) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: func RepeatUntilAcceptable[In, Out any](config RepeatUntilAcceptableConfig[In, Out]) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: func RepeatUntil[In, Out any](config RepeatUntilConfig[In, Out]) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: func ScatterGather[In, Element, Result any](config ScatterGatherConfig[In, Element, Result]) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: func Sequence[In, Out any]( engine *runtime.Engine, name string, agents ...*core.Agent, ) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: func Supervisor[In, Out any](engine *runtime.Engine, config SupervisorConfig[In, Out]) (*core.Agent, error)
workflow: type AttemptHistory[Out any] struct { Attempts []Attempt[Out] }
workflow: type Attempt[Out any] struct { Output Out Feedback Feedback }
workflow: type ConsensusConfig[In, Element any] struct { Name string Description string MaxConcurrency int Voters []func(ctx context.Context, process *core.ProcessContext, input In) (Element, error) Key func(Element) string }
workflow: type Evaluator[In, Out any] func(ctx context.Context, process *core.ProcessContext, input In, latest Out) (Feedback, error)
workflow: type Feedback struct { Score float64 Text string }
workflow: type History[T any] struct { Attempts []T }
workflow: type LoopConfig[In, Out any] struct { Name string Description string MaxIterations int Body *core.Agent Until func(ctx context.Context, input In, latest Out) bool }
workflow: type ParallelConfig[In, Element, Result any] struct { Name string Description string MaxConcurrency int Agents []*core.Agent Joiner func(ctx context.Context, process *core.ProcessContext, results []Element) (Result, error) }
workflow: type RepeatUntilAcceptableConfig[In, Out any] struct { Name string Description string MaxIterations int AcceptableScore float64 Task func(ctx context.Context, process *core.ProcessContext, input In, history *History[Out]) (Out, error) Evaluator Evaluator[In, Out] }
workflow: type RepeatUntilConfig[In, Out any] struct { Name string Description string MaxIterations int Task func(ctx context.Context, process *core.ProcessContext, input In, history *History[Out]) (Out, error) Accept func(ctx context.Context, input In, latest Out, history *History[Out]) bool }
workflow: type ScatterGatherConfig[In, Element, Result any] struct { Name string Description string MaxConcurrency int Generators []func(ctx context.Context, process *core.ProcessContext, input In) (Element, error) Joiner func(ctx context.Context, process *core.ProcessContext, results []Element) (Result, error) }
workflow: type SupervisorConfig[In, Out any] struct { Name string Description string Agents []string Instructions string Render func(In) string Parse func(text string) (Out, error) MaxToolRounds int }
